Phase-58.NAME: Premium Admin Cockpit
Phase-58.objective: Convert the admin panel into a premium compact operator cockpit without hiding emergency controls.
Phase-58.non-goals: Backend admin API changes, session/auth changes, deploy/install changes, MTProto runtime changes.

steps.step-1: Map admin first-screen tasks: service health, users, devices, MTProto, tariffs, analytics, incidents.
steps.step-2: Retune admin layout/navigation for compact phone/tablet/desktop operator use.
steps.step-3: Retune dashboard as dense health and KPI command surface.
steps.step-4: Retune users/devices with search, filters, bounded scrolling, and readable row density.
steps.step-5: Retune MTProto and MTProto analytics while preserving redaction and confirmation actions.
steps.step-6: Retune plans, servers, and analytics without changing canonical tariffs or runtime data.
steps.step-7: Create Phase-58 smoke for admin route density, redaction, confirmations, and no-overlap.
steps.step-8: Verify phone/tablet/desktop screenshots and reduced-motion admin surfaces.
steps.step-9: Run frontend-admin build, smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected surface guard.

Phase-58.acceptance: Admin panel feels premium but remains a fast operational console.
